results.rendered_html: paribhāvin (wie eben) adj. = paribhavin gaṇa grahādi zu  P. 3,1,134 . atithiparibhāvini (voc. fem.)  ŚĀK. 44,12 . paribhāvīni tārāṇām — udbhāsīni jalejāni der Sterne spottend  BHAṬṬ. 6,74 . vaidyayatnaparibhāvinaṃ (so die Corrigg., die Calc. Ausg. ˚bhāviṇaṃ, wie der  ST.  Text) gadam eine Krankheit, die aller Anstrengungen der Aerzte spottet,  RAGH. 19,53 .

results.rendered_html:
paribhāvin a. (nī f.)
1 Humiliating, despising, treating with contempt;  Ś. 4. 
2 Putting to shame, surpassing, excelling.
3 Setting at naught, defying; vaidyayatnaparibhāvinaṃ gadaṃ  R. 19. 53  ‘defying medical remedies’.
